summary: WiseDrive 8 New Features - Complete Testing. All 8 features verified working. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features validated via Playwright UI testing.

feature_1_month_filter_payroll.description: Month filter dropdown exists in Payroll Batches view
feature_1_month_filter_payroll.evidence: Screenshot shows 'All Months' dropdown filter alongside Year, Country, and Status filters

feature_2_lop_defaults_zero.description: LOP Days defaults to 0 for all employees in payroll preview
feature_2_lop_defaults_zero.evidence: Payroll preview shows LOP Days column with all values defaulting to 0

feature_3_incentive_overtime_columns.description: Incentive Amount and OT Days columns are editable in payroll preview
feature_3_incentive_overtime_columns.evidence: Payroll preview table shows editable Incentive and OT Days columns with input fields

feature_4_attendance_legend_statuses.description: Attendance calendar legend shows Weekly Off (W), Org Holiday (H), Overtime (O) statuses
feature_4_attendance_legend_statuses.evidence: Legend bar displays all status types including W, H, O with color coding

feature_5_overtime_in_attendance_modal.description: Overtime option available in attendance day-edit modal status dropdown
feature_5_overtime_in_attendance_modal.evidence: Status dropdown shows 'O - Overtime' option when editing attendance

feature_6_holiday_calendar_tab.description: Holiday Calendar tab displays and allows adding/deleting holidays
feature_6_holiday_calendar_tab.evidence: Holiday Calendar tab visible with Add Holiday button, year/country filters, and modal for adding holidays

feature_7_overtime_pay_per_day_field.description: Overtime pay per day field exists in View Employee modal
feature_7_overtime_pay_per_day_field.evidence: Employee modal shows 'Overtime Pay / Day' field in Employment Details section with value 500

feature_8_salary_calculation.description: New salary calculation: Gross + Incentive + OT Pay - Deductions
feature_8_salary_calculation.evidence: Payroll preview summary shows Gross, Incentives, OT Pay, Deductions, and Net calculation

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 5 employees.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new features fully tested and working: 1) Month filter in Payroll batches view, 2) LOP Days defaults to 0 in payroll preview, 3) Incentive Amount and OT Days editable columns in payroll preview, 4) Attendance calendar legend shows W/H/O statuses, 5) Overtime option in attendance edit modal, 6) Holiday Calendar tab for country-specific holidays, 7) Overtime pay per day field in employee modal, 8) New salary calculation formula implemented.
